text: The $HYPE token is showing strong bullish momentum and price support, with notable large options positioning ahead of expiry. The token operates under a deflationary model with daily buybacks funded by protocol revenue exceeding staking rewards, resulting in net token removal from circulation. This deflationary pressure is expected to stabilize supply and support price appreciation. Market sentiment around $HYPE is positive, with smart money positioning and community confidence in its long-term value proposition.
author: elfa_2042302212689301985

text: Hyperliquid is gaining recognition as a top decentralized exchange (DEX) and perpetuals platform, matching Binance's liquidity and spreads across trade sizes from $10k to $1M, especially on BTC and SOL. It is noted for its 24/7 operation, no KYC, and open liquidity provision. The platform is also highlighted as a key player in the emerging onchain markets revolution, with its HIP-3 markets and USDH stablecoin gaining traction as core components of the onchain financial stack. Hyperliquid's positioning as the 'everything exchange' with cross-margin and unified risk engine is seen as a defensible market structure poised for winner-take-most dynamics.
author: elfa_2042070760567795852

text: Hyperliquid's ecosystem is expanding with new product launches and integrations. Notably, Hyperbeat launched Liquid Banking on HyperliquidX, providing a fully onchain banking layer for saving, spending, trading, and ramping from a single self-custodial account. The dHEDGE integration with HyperliquidX is nearing launch, offering vault deposits managed by traders with real track records and potential DAO-backed funding. Additionally, the Hyperliquid Agents Arena trading competition is active, incentivizing algorithmic trading strategies with prize pools. The platform is also enhancing user tools with upcoming custom indicators, stops, order book data, and liquidation information to provide traders with better edges.
author: elfa_2042056400889679955

text: The broader crypto market narrative is shifting from hype-driven speculation to real product adoption, sustainable tokenomics, and institutional integration. Discussions highlight the maturation of stablecoins into real payment and treasury infrastructure, the rise of tokenized real-world assets (RWAs) with $27.6B in tokenized assets growing 30% in Q1 2026, and the importance of privacy technologies like zero-knowledge proofs and confidential computing. Equity perpetuals onchain are evolving, with platforms like OndoPerps integrating tokenized stocks to improve liquidity and reduce funding costs. The market is also seeing a focus on durable business models, real revenue generation, and the emergence of DePIN and robotics as new economic layers. Meanwhile, AI and crypto convergence is noted as a significant second-order effect. Despite these structural shifts, much of crypto Twitter remains focused on short-term price action and hype cycles.
author: elfa_2042275578997522730

text: Hyperliquid and its ecosystem, including HyperliquidX and HIP-3 markets, are experiencing significant growth and adoption. Hyperliquid is recognized as a leading DeFi protocol by revenue in Q1 2026, topping with $192M. The platform offers a unified trading experience with perps, spot, options, predictions, and RWAs, powered by a shared risk engine, positioning it as a strong competitor to centralized exchanges. The HIP-3 markets saw a surge in volume during geopolitical events, notably the Iran war, with commodities futures volumes surpassing crypto-native pairs. Hyperliquid's HLP vault provides liquidity but has faced coordinated pump-and-dump attacks exploiting low liquidity assets, leading to losses absorbed by the vault. The platform is actively improving risk parameters to mitigate such exploits. Additionally, Hyperliquid has launched zero-fee on/off ramps directly from US bank and brokerage accounts, enhancing user experience and competing with traditional brokers. The ecosystem is also expanding with integrations like dHEDGE and new features such as custom indicators and order book tools. The $HYPE token shows strong price support and deflationary dynamics through buybacks funded by protocol revenue, reinforcing its value proposition.
author: elfa_2042391368811819314

text: first i want to fade out all the hate and clowning of mistakes that is a sad byproduct of stepping out under the public eye and second because i want to be alone with my thoughts and not get influenced by the opinions of others. i am immensely grateful to my community that supported me and had my back so many times. i truly appreciate all of you, much love. but now its time to be alone with myself and focus on the path. please bear with me. 𝐡𝐨𝐥𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬: 888888 USDC 𝐭𝐨𝐭𝐚𝐥 𝐀𝐔𝐌 𝐢𝐧 𝐝𝐨𝐥𝐥𝐚𝐫: 888888 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐠𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐛𝐚𝐫 (𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐳𝐞𝐝): ▮▮▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯ 10% 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐠𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐛𝐚𝐫 (𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐥𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐮𝐏𝐧𝐋): ▮▮▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯▯ 10%
author: admin#2325165654

text: 𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐥 𝐧𝐮𝐦𝐛𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐞 888888$ to 8888888$ doing a trading challenge again. third time's a charm little bit of context: did a 100k-to-1m trading challenge on twitter from summer to winter in 2024. took me 119 days to complete (was prime conditions back then). highest multiple was 5x, it was done with sound risk management rails and 100+ trades, no big outlier wins or big kingmaker trades and no airdrop money or any form of monetizing my social media. that was my prime. i was max focussed, followed protocol, brushed off mistakes quickly and got back on track fast after setbacks. shortly after completion of this challenge i off-ramped a bit of money and started a second one. 500k-to-5m challenge, every trade in public wallets and logged in my telegram channel because twitter suspened my acc. ran from december 2024 and stopped in august 2025 with a balance of around 1.5m. it was a failure. the first couple of months went stellar and i quickly tripled my money (again on sound risk management, no excessive risk) but then things started to derail. i took bigger risks, i stopped following protocol, i let trades run longer than necessary and i got sloppy on logging changes. then destiny struck in form of the alt5 sigma and wlfi trades..some of you remember. i got blinded by greed and oversized horribly. was wounded badly and all went downhill from there. in the months that followed i had trouble processing this loss and i could not find my way back. my trading went more and more shizo (pasternaks finest soldiers remember), i overtraded a lot and took low conviction setups instead of being patient. still made some bank here and there and ended the year 2025 breakeven but was mentally wrecked. started drinking and fell into depression. spend everyday reminiscing of what could have been, torturing myself. bottom line: i could not handle operating a 7-figure portfolio at that time and i had deficits in emotional control that went under the radar previously. i invested a lot of effort, time and money to work on these problems (thank you M for the help) and now i am rdy to try again. why am i doing this? my best performances were always while trading in public. i like the pressure, the accountability and it prevents me from doing stupid things when i know people are watching. also this space is full of larps and liars who give people a false impression of what it really means to trade fulltime. i want to give an unfiltered insight into this journey and hope others will follow and we bring a bit of the old glory of CT back. where people had the balls to put their money where their mouth is and respect was only granted to those who had skin in the game and stood their ground in the arena. the only real downside of doing this sort of public challenges is the risk of anchor bias due to fixed targets. i am aware of that, but in my case i think the benefits outweight the negatives. shooters shoot. going full Cortez mode again, the boats will be burned. everything that can be sacrificed will be sacrificed. i will move to a fresh tax haven where i don't know a single soul, to lower my tax rate from 16% to 8%. will spend as much time as possible in front of the screen and try to push myself to the maximum. majority of my money will be in the markets again, no big safety nets and no plan B. either let me fly or give me death. no inbetween. every trade will be logged (entry, exit, size) and will be facilitated on public wallets as much as possible. end of every quarter i will crunch the numbers and publish a summary and an equity curve. i am using the same template as in my first 2 public trading challenges. the progress bars start at 10% instead of 0% so that eventual negative balances can be displayed. 0% is 0$, 10% is starting point and 100% is 8888888$. comments will either be disabled or not read. the reasons for this are two-fold.

text: Highlight clip Qiao Wang: We Only Invest in Founders with "Childhood Trauma" and "Autism" Alliance DAO founding partner Qiao Wang said in a September 6, 2024 interview on the When Shift Happens channel, half-jokingly, that the firm invests in founders who show strong "autistic traits" and have childhood trauma. He noted that when evaluating consumer product founders, autistic traits are almost a requirement. He believes such founders can think independently, reason contrarianly, and stay focused without being distracted by online consensus. Childhood trauma, he added, is equally important, as it drives a constant need to prove oneself. Qiao summarized: autistic traits determine how you think, while childhood trauma determines why you act. — link

text: Iran 10 Points Breakdown: infinityhedge US stance: 1. Nonaggression: highly likely to agree though Iran wants Russia/China as guarantors as well (not sure here) 2. Control over SoH: won't agree, unacceptable precedent 3. Nuclear Enrichment: might agree. Iran softened its stance & open to strict limits 4 & 5. Lift All Sanctions: highly likely to agree 6. End UN Resolutions: can lobby for this though Neither US nor EU is likely to allow Iran to rebuild its military legally with Russia or China. 7. End IAEA Probes: highly likely to lobby. Iran has softened this demand also 8. Compensation: won't pay. Iran softened, open to using its own frozen funds instead 9. US Troop Withdrawal: might agree to partial cuts but refuses a total pullout. Iran has backed away from this demand as well somewhat 10. Total Ceasefire: highly likely to agree but Israel currently refuses to halt its military operations in Lebanon - PEACE TALKS EXPECTED TO START FROM THIS FRIDAY
